title: Contact a Community Volunteer Income Tax Program officer - Canada.ca
content:
## Contact a Community Volunteer Income Tax Program officer
- Select the tab for your province or territory
- Fill out the form and click on "Submit"
Information sent using this form is not encrypted or otherwise secured. Please DO NOT include Protected B information. Only inquiries from eligible individuals (Note: This link will open in a new tab or window) or community organizations (Note: This link will open in a new tab or window) will be responded to.
- Western region Alberta, British Columbia, Manitoba, Saskatchewan, Northwest Territories, Nunavut, Yukon
- Ontario region Ontario
- Quebec region Quebec
- Atlantic region Newfoundland & Labrador, New Brunswick, Nova Scotia, Prince Edward Island
Personal information is collected and used to contact the individual or organization regarding the Canada Revenue Agency’s Community Volunteer Income Tax Program, which is administered under the authority of the Income Tax Act and the Canada Revenue Agency Act .  Failure to provide this information will prevent you from submitting this form, and as a result we will be unable to contact you.
Refer to Personal Information Bank CRA PPU 100 at canada.ca/cra-info-source . Under the Privacy Act , individuals have a right of access to, correction and protection of their personal information and to file a complaint to the Privacy Commissioner of Canada regarding CRA’s handling of their personal information.
